issues.fix: Add <title>3.5-Zimmer-Wohnung in Zürich Seefeld | WohnungsDirekt</title> to <head>
Add <meta name="description" content="3.5-Zimmer-Wohnung in Zürich Seefeld, 92m², CHF 2850/Mt. Balkon mit Seeblick, renoviert 2019.">
Change the logo <h1> to a <div> or <span>, keep only the listing title as <h1>
Add lang="de-CH" to <html>

issues.summary: All-div layout (no semantic elements: main, nav, article, section)
issues.expected_result: semantic element counts (main, nav, article, section) all 0
issues.fix: Replace wrapper divs with <main>, <nav>, <article>, <section> as appropriate
Move inline styles to style.css classes
Add descriptive alt attributes to all 3 images

issues.summary: Broken heading hierarchy: h1 -> h4 -> h2 -> h6
issues.expected_result: sequence shows h1,h4,h1,h2,h6,h2,h2,h2,h2,h2,h2,h2 — levels skip and repeat
issues.fix: Fix heading hierarchy to be sequential: h1 -> h2 -> h3 etc.
Add Zum Inhalt springen as first element in body

issues.expected_result: returns app.js script element (should have defer or async)
issues.fix: Add defer attribute: <script src="app.js" defer></script>
Add loading="lazy" to all images below the fold
Add <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">

issues.expected_result: at least one ReferenceError message present
issues.fix: Remove or fix the call to nonExistentFunction() in app.js

issues.expected_result: returns elements with insufficient contrast ratio
issues.fix: Change .low-contrast color from #999 to #595959 or darker (4.5:1 ratio)

issues.summary: Custom div-based dropdown with no ARIA attributes
issues.expected_result: no role, aria-expanded, or aria-haspopup attributes
issues.fix: Add role="listbox", aria-expanded, aria-haspopup, and role="option" to children

issues.expected_result: positive number (more inputs than labels — labels are 0)
issues.fix: Add <label for="..."> for each form input
Remove tabindex or set tabindex="-1" on decorative element
Add rel="noopener noreferrer" to the link
Add <link rel="canonical" href="https://wohnungsdirekt.ch/objekt/seefeld-123">
Add og:title, og:description, og:image, og:url meta tags

issues.summary: Unoptimized BMP image format (should be WebP/AVIF)
issues.fix: Convert hero.bmp to WebP or AVIF format

issues.expected_result: count > 0 (images without dimensions cause layout shift)
issues.fix: Add width and height attributes to all elements
issues.notes: CLS may not show in perf vitals for static local page; the missing dimensions are the root cause

issues.summary: Tiny click targets in footer (12px font-size links)
issues.expected_result: rects with height < 24px (WCAG recommends minimum 24x24px target)
issues.fix: Increase font-size to at least 14px and add padding for 44x44px minimum tap target
Add Secure flag to cookie: document.cookie = '...;Secure'
issues.notes: Secure flag only effective over HTTPS; on HTTP it will always be false

issues.fix: Set cookie server-side with HttpOnly flag (cannot be set from JavaScript)
issues.notes: HttpOnly CANNOT be set via document.cookie — this is inherent to JS-set cookies. The fix requires moving cookie setting to server-side code.

issues.fix: Either pre-allocate space for the banner or remove the late injection
issues.notes: Must wait >2s after page load for the banner to inject. Run perf vitals after a 3s delay.

issues.summary: font-display: block causing FOIT (Flash of Invisible Text)
issues.detection_command: ff-rdp eval 'Array.from(document.styleSheets).flatMap(s => { try { return Array.from(s.cssRules) } catch(e) { return [] } }).filter(r => r.cssText && r.cssText.includes("font-display: block")).length'
issues.fix: Change font-display: block to font-display: swap in style.css
Reduce DOM complexity: paginate reviews, lazy-load sections, simplify nesting
Change to <meta name="robots" content="index, follow"> or remove the tag
Add <script type="application/ld+json"> with RealEstateListing schema

issues.summary: Mixed content: HTTP image loaded on page
issues.fix: Change all HTTP URLs to HTTPS
issues.notes: Mixed content warnings only appear when the page is served over HTTPS. When served over HTTP (localhost:8787), this is not flagged by the browser. To test: serve via HTTPS or use ff-rdp eval to check for http:// src attributes.

issues.fix: Add CSP header via server configuration or <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy">
issues.notes: python3 -m http.server does not set CSP headers. This is a server-side configuration issue — the detection verifies absence. For the static fixture, add a <meta> CSP tag as the fix.

issues.summary: Fixed-width table (2000px) causing horizontal overflow on mobile
issues.fix: Remove fixed width, use max-width:100% and overflow-x:auto wrapper
